entities.name: Partnership Pipeline
entities.context: Staged relationship/deal progression framework with 6 phases

entities.name: Discovery
entities.context: First stage of partnership pipeline - initial contact/awareness

entities.name: Education
entities.context: Second stage - sharing knowledge and building understanding

entities.name: Exploration
entities.context: Third stage - investigating mutual fit and opportunities

entities.name: Negotiation
entities.context: Fourth stage - working out terms and agreements

entities.name: Partnership
entities.context: Fifth stage - current active stage; formal relationship established

entities.name: Maintenance
entities.context: Final stage - ongoing relationship management and nurturing
